abilities.description: The next time an enemy moves through an adjacent tile, cancel its movement and attack it.Upgraded: The next time an enemy moves through an adjacent tile, cancel its movement and attack it. Bonus Passive: While it's not your turn, your basic attack inflicts Bruise 2.
